turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: 👨🏻‍⚕️Booking or Changing a medical appointment 🗨️ “Hi, I’d like to make an appointment to see a doctor.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. What’s the reason for your visit today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I’ve been having headaches and feeling more tired than usual over the past week.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, headaches and fatigue for about a week — got it. Have your symptoms been getting worse recently, or staying about the same?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: They’ve gotten a bit worse, actually. The headaches are more frequent now, and I’m feeling even more tired than before. So Is there available tomorrow morning?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. We do have some openings tomorrow morning — what time works best for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: How early could I come in?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. The earliest slot we have tomorrow is  a.m. — would that work for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: is a bit early for me. Would there be any little later time in the morning?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. We also have  a.m. and  a.m. available. Which of those would suit you better?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes,  a.m. sounds good.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, I’ll hold  for you. Could I get your full name for the appointment?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Charissa, and the first letter is C, not K.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it — Charissa, with a "C". May I also have your surname, please?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Guo

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thank you, Ms. Guo. Just to confirm: an appointment for tomorrow at  a.m. to see a doctor regarding headaches and fatigue.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yep, thanks. Do I need to bring anything? Do I need to bring my Medicare card even if I'm a student visa holder?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, please bring your Medicare card if you have it. If you don't have it, you can still come. We can talk about other ways to pay.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I see. And how long is the appointment likely to take?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Most standard consultations are about 15 to 20 minutes, though it may go a bit longer depending on what the doctor needs to discuss with you.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: That’s good to know. Also, is bulk billing available for students?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sometimes, yes. It depends on the doctor and your situation. Some doctors bulk bill students. Others may charge a small fee. Are you a student with a valid Medicare card?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, I have a Medicare card.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s good! If you have a Medicare card, you may be able to get bulk billing. It depends on the doctor and the type of visit. Did you want a long visit or just a quick check for your headache?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Just a quick check please.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, a quick check is fine. For a simple visit like this, bulk billing may be possible. We will check when you arrive.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Thank you. See you tomorrow.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're welcome! Just to make sure — your appointment is tomorrow at  a.m. Please come about 10 minutes early. Bring your Medicare card if you have it. Anything else I can help you with before you go?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Could I request a copy of my results after the visit?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, you can. After your visit, you can ask the doctor or our staff for a copy of your results. Some results may take a day or two. We can print or email them to you. Would you like the results sent by email or printed paper?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I think printed paper is fine.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great, printed paper is no problem. We can give it to you before you leave. Is there anything else you want to know before your appointment?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: No, I think that’s everything for now.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, thank you. If you have any problems or need to change your booking, just call us. Have a good day, and take care!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Thank you! Have a nice day!
